Aerodrome Votes → votes.csv

Voter: 0xa79cd47655156b299762dfe92a67980805ce5a31

This dashboard tracks weekly earnings from a voter on Aerodrome Finance and compares the voter's actual results against alternative allocation strategies. Each epoch lasts one week; the voter locks AERO tokens and distributes votes across liquidity pools to earn a share of each pool's fees and bribes, proportional to their vote share.

The chart below plots actual and predicted earnings and APR per epoch. Four voting strategies are shown:

  • Actual – the voter's real vote allocation and resulting earnings.
  • PropBC5 – votes split proportionally across the top 5 blue-chip and stable pools.
  • Opt10BC – votes optimally allocated across up to 10 blue-chip pools to maximize earnings (water-filling optimization).
  • Opt10 – same optimization but across all pools, not limited to blue chips.

Current strategies as of 2026-04-18 13:15 UTC
